body_excerpt: In kbase_csf_queue_group_suspend_prepare of mali_kbase_csf_kcpu.c , there is a possible out of bounds write due to incorrect memory mapping. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
